entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Local seed samples of Cicer arietinum L. collected for germplasm and evaluated for agronomic traits

entities.name: MADHYA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where 351 seed samples of local chickpeas were collected

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the chickpea germplasm collection missions were conducted

entities.name: GERMPLASM COLLECTION
entities.description: A world collection of seed samples maintained at the ICRISAT Centre

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTRE
entities.description: A location (18°N) where the world germplasm collection is maintained and agronomic evaluations were performed

entities.name: GWALIOR
entities.description: A location (26°N) where agronomic evaluations of chickpea sets were performed

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Eight specific characteristics used to evaluate the performance of chickpea accessions

entities.name: SEEDS PER POD
entities.description: An agronomic trait used to evaluate chickpea performance, showing similar results across locations

entities.name: 100-SEED MASS
entities.description: An agronomic trait used to evaluate chickpea performance, showing similar results across locations

entities.name: MORPHOAGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Traits of chickpea that exhibited vast variability during the collection missions

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, a lead organization in the germplasm collection effort

entities.name: JNKVV
entities.description: Jawaharlal Nehru Krishi Vishwa Vidyalaya, Jabalpur, a partner organization in the germplasm collection effort

entities.name: NBPGR
entities.description: National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources, New Delhi, a partner organization in the germplasm collection effort
